## Summary

-

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release / CI / repository hygiene

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Targeted verifier or behavior test:
- [ ] Manual desktop/runtime check, if user-visible behavior changed:

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I added or updated tests/verifiers for behavior or boundary changes.
- [ ] I did not weaken existing verifiers to make the change pass.
- [ ] I reviewed logs, sample data, and screenshots for secrets or local paths before committing.
- [ ] I confirmed new dependencies or copied assets are license-compatible with MIT distribution.
- [ ] I followed the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## Notes for Reviewers

-
